sheets.name: Outreach Angles
data: I saw your current destination/project development in Riyadh/Jeddah and felt there may be a useful visual support angle.
Luxury interiors, project presentation visuals, hospitality/residential concept clarity.
I can prepare one small project-specific visual direction sample for your team to judge before any paid work.
Short Saudi-focused luxury ad + 3 interior mockups
Your upcoming hospitality project has the type of atmosphere where design directly becomes guest memory.
Guest experience, pre-opening visual content, F&B/public area storytelling.
I can create a concise visual direction board or 20-second ad sample around the property identity.
Your restaurant portfolio already depends heavily on ambience, mood and visual memory.
New outlet interiors, premium reels, campaign visuals, concept previews.
I can create one trial concept/ad direction around one of your restaurants.
For residential projects, the visual sale often begins before the client sees the site.
Show units, sales galleries, premium image packs, buyer-facing presentation.
I can create a sample sales visual or presentation frame for one current project.
I am not approaching this as a replacement for design teams, but as visual support for client-facing presentation and concept communication.
Proposal visuals, design communication, client approval support.
I can create one support sample based on a room/photo/reference to test the value.

sheets.name: Send Guidance
data: Sendable as a public-source verified lead-intelligence preview, not as a promise of guaranteed client conversion.
Send to Erwin Ereno team as proof of Saudi market-entry research capability and as a paid-service sample/preview.
Company/project existence, official websites or public-source routes, city relevance, sector/service fit, and practical outreach route.
Private mobile numbers, hidden personal emails, guaranteed decision-maker response, or guaranteed project award.
Share 5–10 screenshot rows first, then send full workbook if they approve the research direction.

This is structured as a Riyadh + Jeddah market-entry lead intelligence sheet, focused on usable companies, active project evidence, official routes, and priority scoring — not generic company information.
Do not say it contains private decision-maker numbers. Say it identifies the best decision-maker route and public contact path.
A++/A+/A are the leads to show first. B+/B can be used after the client accepts the direction. C+ should be kept as reserve/source-watch leads.
Revised ratings applied; obvious weak C labels removed; Saudi Diyar route corrected to official Diyar website; source log expanded.
